summary: Iteration 4: SEO Improvements Testing - 14/14 tests passed. All 10 SEO improvements verified. Fixed FAQPage JSON-LD schema issue (needed to be in index.html, not React Helmet).
critical_code_review_comments: FAQPage JSON-LD schema was not rendering via react-helmet-async due to static schemas in index.html. Fixed by moving FAQPage schema to index.html.
Removed duplicate Helmet block from ProfessionalLandingPage.js since all schemas are now in index.html
All SEO improvements working correctly: single H1, FAQ section with schema, Reviews page with schemas, trust signals, breadcrumbs, descriptive alt texts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 SEO improvements verified: (1) Single H1 on homepage, (2) FAQ section with 8 questions using details/summary, (3) FAQPage JSON-LD schema with 8 questions now in index.html, (4) Trust bar with 'Since 2023' and '180-Day Warranty' and '500+ Repairs', (5) /reviews page is full page at /reviews (not redirect), (6) 10 review cards with data-testid, (7) LocalBusiness schema with aggregateRating on /reviews, (8) BreadcrumbList on /reviews and /about, (9) 'Since 2023' in reviews stats, (10) Navbar Reviews is <a href='/reviews'>, (11) Footer Quick Links has Reviews, (12) Footer has 'since 2023', (13) Service images have 'Bay Area' in alt text, (14) /about has BreadcrumbList schema.

test_results.test_1_single_h1: PASS - Homepage has exactly 1 H1: 'Appliance Repair in San Francisco & Bay Area'
test_results.test_3_faq_schema: PASS - FAQPage JSON-LD with 8 questions (fixed by adding to index.html)
test_results.test_4_trust_bar: PASS - Shows 'Serving Bay Area Since 2023', '180-Day Warranty', '500+ Repairs Completed'
test_results.test_5_reviews_url: PASS - /reviews page loads at correct URL (not redirect to /#reviews)
test_results.test_5b_reviews_title: PASS - Title: 'Customer Reviews | FixitBay Appliance Repair San Francisco'
test_results.test_7_localbusiness_schema: PASS - LocalBusiness schema with aggregateRating + 5 Google reviews
test_results.test_11_footer_reviews: PASS - Footer Quick Links has Reviews link to /reviews
test_results.test_13_service_alts: PASS - 18/18 service images have 'Bay Area' in alt text

bug_fix_applied.issue: FAQPage JSON-LD schema was not appearing on homepage
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: react-helmet-async was not injecting dynamic script tags when static schemas already existed in index.html
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added FAQPage schema directly to index.html with hardcoded 8 FAQ questions
